detail: web_login_check -> if [ -f .rc-web-server.pid ]; then kill $(cat .rc-web-server.pid) >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; (npm run dev) > .rc-web-server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .rc-web-server.pid; sleep 5

web_login_check -> python3 - "http://127.0.0.1:3000" <<'PY'
import sys
import time
import urllib.request

url = sys.argv[1]
last = None
for _ in range(30):
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=2) as response:
            if response.status < 500:
                raise SystemExit(0)
    except Exception as exc:
        last = exc
        time.sleep(1)

print("server not ready: " + url + ": " + str(last), file=sys.stderr)
raise SystemExit(1)
PY
web_login_check -> if command -v agent-browser >/dev/null 2>&1; then agent-browser install; else npm install -g agent-browser && agent-browser install; fi
